LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS 4055 SONOMA PROPERTIES, LLC AND DIANA SACA'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE PRAYER TO INVALIDATE THE EASEMENT AND DENIED AS TO ALL OTHER ALLEGATIONS SOUGHT TO BE STRICKEN. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT PLEAD ANY LEGAL BASIS TO INVALIDATE THE EASEMENT NOR DOES IT APPEAR THAT HE CAN CURE THIS DEFICIENCY. NONE OF THE CLAIMS ARE NECESSARILY TIME-BARRED DUE TO THE APPLICATION OF THE DISCOVERY RULE. AS TO THE CERTIFICATE OF COMPLIANCE, PLAINTIFF ALLEGES THAT 4055 LLC AND MS. SACA CONSPIRED WITH MS. SABELLA TO COMMIT TORTUOUS CONDUCT AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND DID SO FOR THEIR OWN FINANCIAL GAIN AND THUS PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED THE TORT CLAIMS AGAINST 4055 LLC AND MS. SACA. MOREOVER, THE CONCEALMENT AND CONSTRUCTIVE FRAUD CLAIMS CAN BE PLEADED DIRECTLY AGAINST DEFENDANTS BASED ON THEIR ALLEGED CONCEALMENT OF THE CERTIFICATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS 4055 SONOMA PROPERTIES, LLC AND DIANA SACA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED IN ITS ENTIRETY. THE DISCOVERY RULE APPLIES AND IT CANNOT BE DETERMINED AS A MATTER OF LAW THAT PLAINTIFF HAD NOTICE OF THE EXCLUSIVE EASEMENT ON MARCH 22, 2007. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES THAT HE DID NOT RECEIVE A COMPLETE COPY OF THE EXCLUSIVE EASEMENT AND DEFENDANTS MISREPRESENTED ITS SCOPE. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES THAT 4055 LLC AND MS. SACA CONSPIRED WITH MS. SABELLA TO COMMIT TORTUOUS CONDUCT AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND DID SO FOR THEIR OWN FINANCIAL GAIN AND THUS PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED THE TORT CLAIMS AGAINST 4055 LLC AND MS. SACA. MOREOVER, THE CONCEALMENT AND CONSTRUCTIVE FRAUD CLAIMS CAN BE PLEADED DIRECTLY AGAINST DEFENDANTS BASED ON THEIR ALLEGED CONCEALMENT OF MATERIAL FACTS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

JONES IS AWARDED ALL THE FEES HE SEEKS EXCEPT FOR THE FEES INCURRED IN COMMUNICATING WITH A PRIVATE INVESTIGATOR TO LOCATE MR. ENGDAHL (4.75 HOURS) AND THE HOUR ATTRIBUTED TO BLACKSTONE DISCOVERY. MR. JONES IS ENTITLED TO FEES UNDER THE SALES AGREEMENT AS THE PREVAILING PARTY ON ALL THE TORT CLAIMS ALLEGED AGAINST HIM. ALL FEES SOUGHT INCLUDING FEES FOR LITIGATING THE FEES AND COSTS ISSUES (EXCEPT THE 5.75 HOURS MENTIONED PREVIOUSLY) WERE REASONABLY INCURRED. THE HOURLY RATE SOUGHT IS REASONABLE. THIS IS NOT A PROPER MOTION TO DETERMINE THE AWARD OF NON-FEES COSTS. SUCH COSTS WILL BE ADJUDICATED ON PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO TAX COSTS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: Defendant Bart Jones' Joinder In The Motion To Fix Attorney's Fees IS Granted in part. Mr. Jones is awarded all the fees he seeks except for the fees incurred in communicating with a private investigator to locate Mr. Engdahl (4.75 hours) and the hour attributed to Blackstone discovery. Mr. Jones is entitled to fees under the sales agreement as the prevailing party on all the tort claims alleged against him. All fees sought including fees for litigating the fees and costs issues (except the 5.75 hours mentioned previously) were reasonably incurred. The hourly rate sought is reasonable. This is not a proper motion to determine the award of non-fees costs. Such costs will be adjudicated on plaintiff's motion to tax costs. Order signed in open Court. MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CHRISTOPHER RHEINHEIMER OF MANNATT & PHILLIPS, TEL. NO. 291-7461 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JENNIFER J. HAGAN OF THE HAGAN LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (650) 322-8498 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS 4055 SONOMA PROPERTIES, LLC AND DIANA SACA'S Motion To Strike portions of First Amended Complaint is Granted without leave to amend as to the prayer to invalidate the easement and denied as to all other allegations sought to be stricken. Plaintiff does not plead any legal basis to invalidate the easement nor does it appear that he can cure this deficiency. None of the claims are necessarily time-barred due to the application of the discovery rule. As to the certificate of compliance, Plaintiff alleges that 4055 LLC and Ms. Saca conspired with Ms. Sabella to commit tortuous conduct against plaintiff and did so for their own financial gain and thus plaintiff has sufficiently alleged the tort claims against 4055 LLC and Ms. Saca. Moreover, the concealment and constructive fraud claims can be pleaded directly against defendants based on their alleged concealment of the certificate. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. = (302/HEK)
